episodes.title: Epstein survivor raises awareness about human trafficking in visit to Topeka
episodes.description:
The ongoing discussion of human trafficking is being spotlighted in the Capital City, with one woman who is giving a voice to survivors of sexual violence.

For more Local News from WIBW: https://www.wibw.com/
For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzcunT4izof8P3XjmbRd5IQ

episodes.title: Esptein survivor raises awareness of human trafficking during Topeka visit
episodes.description:
Lisa Phillips, a survivor of trafficking and sexual abuse by Jeffrey Epstein, headlined a human trafficking awareness event in Topeka.

For more Local News from WIBW: https://www.wibw.com/
For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzcunT4izof8P3XjmbRd5IQ

episodes.title: Karen Taylor promotes event featuring Lisa Phillips, an Epstein survivor
